opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online booking capability.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours book competitors with instant online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI booking widget capturing job type, location, and urgency 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact means zero digital lead tracking.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from Boise prospects vanishes with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture logging caller info, job details, and follow-up tasks automatically.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 134 Google reviews at 4.6 stars with no evidence of owner response activity.
opportunities.observation: Skipping responses signals disengagement, risking reputation erosion in a competitive Boise market.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized review responses referencing job type and reviewer name within hours.
